task: Monitor upcoming reservations with sourcing gaps and surface internal-transfer or external re-rent options before the branch misses promised availability.
frequency: several sourcing gaps per day across active jobs and branches
tool_today: Sourcing queue, availability dashboard, vendor portals, phone, email
decision_content: Which sourcing path is still viable, what needs escalation first, and whether the branch can still keep the customer promise without overspending.

task: Solicit vendor quotes and convert approved re-rent requests into quotes, purchase orders, and contracts inside the rental workflow.
frequency: multiple re-rent requests per day when owned fleet is short
tool_today: Vendor portals, email, phone, rental ERP, PO workflow
decision_content: Which vendor quote best meets timing, rate, and service constraints and whether the request stays within delegated spend limits.

task: Track active re-rent units from request through dispatch, on-rent, return, and receipt so outside rentals move with the same control as owned fleet.
frequency: active follow-up throughout the rental day
tool_today: Rental ERP, logistics updates, vendor confirmations, receipt records
decision_content: Whether a delay, status mismatch, or missing receipt is normal churn or needs branch, logistics, or vendor escalation.

task: Create or escalate purchase orders for re-rent, fleet, and parts spend that crosses user thresholds, routing exceptions to the right approver tier.
frequency: purchase approvals arrive throughout the day
tool_today: PO approval workflow, email alerts, vendor quotes, inventory settings
decision_content: Whether the spend fits delegated authority, what needs escalation, and which approval tier owns the exception.

task: Assemble the weekly forward shortage and demand-signal brief from historical rentals, seasonal patterns, market events, and sales-team feedback.
frequency: weekly planning cycle plus ad hoc refreshes before busy periods
tool_today: Demand forecast dashboard, rental history, sales notes, spreadsheet or BI export
decision_content: Which emerging shortages are noise versus credible demand shifts worth planning around.

task: Review category and manufacturer availability, lead-time risk, and shortage trends so purchase plans shift before supply constraints block revenue.
frequency: recurring review during shortage periods and seasonal planning
tool_today: Vendor updates, shortage tracker, manufacturer communications, analytics reports
decision_content: Which categories need earlier ordering, alternative suppliers, or different fleet-mix assumptions.

task: Reconcile vendor receipts and purchase invoices for re-rent transactions, clearing mismatch or duplicate-entry exceptions before finance processes the bill.
frequency: every vendor billing cycle and at month-end spikes
tool_today: Purchase invoices, receipt records, PO screen, vendor email
decision_content: Whether the discrepancy is a receiving issue, vendor billing error, or approved exception that finance can process.

task: Maintain preferred-vendor, rate-agreement, and contact records for recurring re-rent categories and branch demand patterns.
frequency: monthly maintenance with ad hoc updates after vendor changes
tool_today: Vendor master, rate sheets, contract archive, notes
decision_content: Which suppliers remain reliable, when negotiated terms are stale, and which branches should use which vendor first.
